scripts.build: cp public/index.php /tmp/laravel_index.php && cp public/.htaccess /tmp/laravel_htaccess && cd frontend && npm run build && cp -r dist/assets ../public/assets && cp dist/index.html ../public/index.html && cp /tmp/laravel_index.php ../public/index.php && cp /tmp/laravel_htaccess ../public/.htaccess
